item_description: Add new model name to Primary Interested Product Model dropdown property in HubSpot
notes: Use the HubSpot property dropdown as the authoritative source for model names — do not use web-sourced names. Exact spelling and formatting matters for downstream workflow branch matching.

item_description: Add new model to Product Models of Interest (multi-select append property)
Add new model branch to CORP | Configurator Product Labeling | General | WF | E3
workflow_reference: CORP | Configurator Product Labeling | General | WF | E3
notes: Branch uses 'model contains [number]' logic. Include all double-digit variants to avoid false matches. Clone steps from an existing model branch.

item_description: Add new model branch to CORP | Brochure Download Product Labeling | General | WF | E3. Set page referrer to model-specific URL slug (e.g. rangeline-21pl).
workflow_reference: CORP | Brochure Download Product Labeling | General | WF | E3
danger_note: Use a specific slug (e.g. 'rangeline-21pl'), not a broad term (e.g. 'rangeline') — broad slugs will match multiple models and mislabel contacts.
notes: Also verify the existing sibling model's slug is specific, not broad. Updated Rangeline 21PS from 'rangeline' to 'rangeline-21ps' in June 2026.

item_description: Add new model branch to CORP | Aimbase Lead Label + Webhook | General | WF | E3. Update branch name and product name property.
workflow_reference: CORP | Aimbase Lead Label + Webhook | General | WF | E3
notes: Clone steps from an existing model branch, then update the product name to the new model. Do not reuse steps without updating — product name will be wrong.

item_description: Get new Meta lead form name(s) for this model from Allison/Bennett and update AMP | Meta Lead Form Routing | General | WF | E3
workflow_reference: AMP | Meta Lead Form Routing | General | WF | E3
notes: Do not guess Meta form names — confirm exact names from Allison or Bennett.

item_description: Verify new model's brochure form is included in the Moderate Intent scoring group
notes: Brochure downloads are a critical scoring signal (~50% last-touch). Do not skip this step.

item_description: Update this SOP with any new workflows or property changes made during this model launch
